message:
fix(command): simplify MOVE to unconditionally return 0 in single-namespace mode

Remove the conditional exists() check since both branches returned
Integer(0). In single-namespace mode, cross-DB MOVE is a semantic
no-op and always returns 0 regardless of key existence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
